comments.text: Ducklings drop down into Lake Michigan through a hole in the concrete at Montrose Pier.

I'm in Chicago for a bird festival, and last night the wonderful folks at Great Lakes Pigeon Rescue threw a pigeon party and handed me pigeon after pigeon to cuddle. If you want to adopt a pigeon, reach out to them. They ship birds safely across the country! greatlakespigeonrescue.org
A Canadian goose on the shores of Lake Erie for #BirdoftheDay #BirdButt
Sanderling on the shore of Lake Huron in Port Sanilac, Michigan. #birds #birding
From one of my favorite wetlands on #worldwetlandsday, Magee Marsh Wildlife Area, Ottawa County, OH.

A grumpy looking Great Blue Heron on a rock in Lake Huron at Southampton, Ontario for the #AlphabetChallenge #WeekZforZoology and for #RockinTuesday #PhotographersOfBluesky #PhotographersUnited #EastCoastKin #PhotoHour #StormHour #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife

I'm selling the most recent handpainted jacket and 33% of the proceeds are going to the Great Lakes Pigeon Rescue in Chicago IL!
gdbee.store/products/tul...

With winter kicking in don't forget to be an accomplice to murders. My Chicago lakefront buddies.
#birds #crows #corvids
If you ever get the chance to visit some Long-tailed Ducks I definitely recommend it. They are fabulous! (Found in winter on the northern coasts of North America and the Great Lakes) #birds 🌿
Nice heron today on pond near Lake Ontario 🪶

🎶 The cold never bothered me anyway🎶 One of two Snowy Owls we had today, chilling by a bit of driftwood on the northeast tip of a beach, unconcerned with the dropping temperatures. (Presumed female) #birds #birding #owls #LakeErie

A tangle of swans. #photography #winter #swans #birds #GreatLakes
#Canada
I finally got a closer look at this interesting duck that's been hanging out in Lake Michigan near the Loyola campus for the past couple of weeks. It's a surf scoter.

Darius works in maintenance. this gull injured its leg & wing this week, grounding it at Westerly for the last few days. Yesterday, Darius secured and transported it to the Lake Erie Nature & Science Center for proper care after his shift. Darius. Certified good dude. and gull names are welcome.

By the way, if anybody's intrigued about pigeons and wants to adopt one as a pet, there are many birds that need homes. Try your local SPCA or Palomacy (www.pigeonrescue.org), Great Lakes Pigeon Rescue (greatlakespigeonrescue.org), or another pigeon rescue near you.

Good morning, #Bluesky!! Have a great day.

A Great Blue Heron having a good scratch on the Lake Huron shoreline in Southampton, Ontario, is my #BirdOfTheDay I was impressed by how violently the bird was scratching that close to its eye with those claws. #EastCoastKin #PhotoHour #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife #photography

33 pound giant snapping turtle was nearly unresponsive when someone found him flailing in Lake Michigan (not a normal habitat). Mystery how he got there. Rescued, and now recovering, but may have pneumonia. www.mlive.com/environment/...

Great Blue Heron on the Lake Huron shoreline looking grumpy because the wind is blowing its feathers #sideways #BlueSkyArtShow #PhotoHour #StormHour #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife #photography

This snowy owl showed up on the shore of Lake Ontario a couple years ago. It’s one of my favorite photos, with the rocky shoreline!
#birds
#photography
#naturephotography
#wildlifephotography
30 seconds of a quiet Lake Erie this evening after sunset, with an evening chorus of Gray Catbirds, Song Sparrows, Yellow Warblers, and more singing in the background.
"I hope this email finds you well" - tired "I hope you are a Chicago local delighted by the mysterious appearance of a giant rubber duck in Lake Michigan" - wired www.dailyscanner.com/giant-rubber...

This one goes out to my friends at for collecting data on the Great Lakes. If you live in the Great Lakes basin you should support them for safer boating, beaching, fishing, paddling, freight hauling and of course…science about me 🌊🌊 seagull.glos.org/support-seag...

Today's alternative #BirdOfTheDay theme is #Breezy. A windblown Grumpy the Great Blue Heron on the Lake Huron shoreline. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #Velvia #2000s #ManualFocusLens
An army of beavers and geese were spotted massing on the shores of Lake Huron, and they don’t look soorry.

Today's alternative #BirdOfTheDay theme is #Juveniles. A juvenile Red Knot on the Lake Huron shoreline during autumn migration. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #Velvia #2000s #VintageLens #ManualFocus
I don't often take pictures of the many, many, MANY Ring-billed Gulls at the beach, but yesterday the younger gulls were having too much fun to resist. 😊🧵 #birds

a pair of common mergansers on Lake Superior.
🪶 #birds

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #Migratory with the alternative theme #BugCatchers. A Tree Swallow in southern Ontario, Canada resting after crossing Lake Erie. It will spend the winter as far south as Central America catching bugs. #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #OldManualFocusPrimeLens
One of my favourite photos of some of the local swans. #photography #swans #LakeOntario #Toronto
A Sanderling on a Lake Huron shoreline in Southampton, Ontario, during autumn migration for #WaderWednesday. #EastCoastKin #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife #photography #naturephotography

Today's alternative #BirdOfTheDay theme is #RestingBeakFace. One obvious choice, Grumpy the Great Blue Heron standing on a boulder in the Lake Huron shallows at Southampton, Ontario. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #Velvia #2000s #VintageLens #ManualFocus
A band of Canadian Cobra Chickens stand guard ready to protect our Border as a mysterious vessel in the distance slowly moves through Canadian waters! 😁
A pair of snowy owls has taken up residence along a Lake Michigan beach, sparking curious speculation about how long the Arctic birds of prey will call Chicago home.
DO IT OREGON!!! BRING THE GIANT INFLATABLE DUCK TO LAKE MICHIGAN

The #time I went down to the Lake Huron shoreline for the sunrise and met Grumpy the Great Blue Heron. For the #AlphabetChallenge #WeekTForTime #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #Velvia #2000s #ManualFocusLens

A juvenile Ring-billed Gull on the Lake Huron shoreline in Southampton, Ontario. My #BirdOfTheDay and #FeatheredFriday post. I'm not sure if it's yawning, calling or begging to be fed. The bright red gap is to stimulate an adult to feed the young. #EastCoastKin #birds #birdphotography #wildlife

Good morning, #Bluesky!! Have a great day.

#birds Downy Woodpecker with his Lake Michigan breakfast.

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #RuffledFeathers. Grumpy, the windblown Great Blue Heron on the Lake Huron shoreline at Southampton, Ontario. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #Velvia #2000s #VintageLens #ManualFocus
Two swans on Lake Ontario today preparing their Valentine’s image poses #birds

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #WingsOverWater. Wings and fins over Lake Huron at Southampton, Ontario. An Osprey with a freshly caught White Sucker. #BruceCounty #EastCoastKin #photography #birds #nature #wildlife
This Snowy Owl looks like he is resting on top of the clouds but he's actually riding on an ice floe on Lake Ontario. 💕 #WildlifePhotography #NaturePhotography #Owls #SnowyOwls
A Sanderling on the Lake Huron shoreline during autumn migration for the #SensoryArt theme #Seasons #EastCoastKin #birds #nature #wildlife #photography

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #egrets. This is a juvenile Reddish Egret in the Lake Huron shallows on the Bruce Peninsula, Ontario. It's a very long way from home. The species breeding range is the Gulf of Mexico coastline and the Atlantic coastline of Florida. I doubt it survived.

Today's alternative #BirdOfTheDay theme is #LongNecks. A Great Blue Heron demonstrates that its neck is as long as it's body. Photographed on the Lake Huron shoreline at Southampton, Ontario on Fujichrome #Velvia. #BruceCounty #EastCoastKin #photography #birds #wildlife #PhotographersOfBluesky
A red-breasted merganser swallows a round goby, this morning in Lake Michigan near Montrose Pier

#Connect2Nature Sitting by Lake Ontario on a quiet morning when a long line of Cormorants flew by. The spectacle lasted about 5 min. #BirdoftheDay theme today is timing. This is why one should always have a camera nearby. #Birds #nature #photography
Friday morning birding on the Chicago lakefront. #birds
A lone ring-billed gull being buffeted by the winds of November at the beach today. 🪶

🤠🤙📿
Why are herons such bad liars? 🤔
• Their stories are always a bit fishy.🤪 Great blue heron (Ardea herodias), on the Credit River, Mississauga, Ontario. 🍁 #Birds 🦉 🪶 #Wildlife 🦉 #Nature 🌿 #Photography 📷 #CanadianContent 🍁 #NeuroSpicy 📿 #Art #ElbowsUp 💪💪
We learned that Oregon is playing Northwestern at Martin Stadium on Lake Michigan and we demand Oregon bring the giant inflatable duck.
Yes I’m a strange bird. So just get over it. I’m to old to change. ~rLs Early spring along Lake Michigan Photography by Kay Novy

On our Aussie reef tour, we can see the flying Silver Gull with the Crested Terns. 🇦🇺🐠🌊 These 🇦🇺 Gulls have been recorded in the USA; once in 1947 at Lake Ontario, and again 📸 in Salem County, New Jersey, in 1996. 🇺🇸🦅🕊️ Clifftop 🌄 soon. #nature #wildlife #birds #birdphotography #photography

Lake Erie is our LIFE SOURCE—we survive and thrive because of its freshwater. It doesn’t belong to any of us—is held in trust between the US and Canada for all. When I was first elected there were only 2 nesting Bald Eagles left on Lake Erie—now thanks to our conservation efforts there are HUNDREDS.

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #Raptors. An Osprey with a freshly caught White Sucker over Lake Huron at Southampton, Ontario. #BruceCounty #ECK #photography #birds #nature #wildlife #TenMinutesFromHome #VintageLens #ManualFocusLens

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #MorningLight. An immature Red Knot on the Lake Huron shoreline illuminated by the rising sun. #EastCoastKin #photography #birds #birdphotography #wildlife #wildlifephotography

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #webbedfeet so here's a Semipalmated Plover on the Lake Huron shoreline during spring migration. Their common English name derives from their partially webbed feet. #EastCoastKin #PhotoHour #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife #photography #naturephotography

Today's #BirdOfTheDay theme is #flying to tie in with #FlyDay Friday. Here's a Caspian Tern flying along the Lake Huron shoreline fishing in the shallows at Southampton, Ontario. #FeatheredFriday #EastCoastKin #birds #birdphotography #nature #wildlife #wildlifephotography
